description: Operationalizes machine learning models at scale — building pipelines, automating training, managing deployments, and monitoring model health in production.
core_skills: Cloud Platforms (AWS / GCP / Azure — one minimum)
expected_projects: End-to-end ML pipeline with DVC or MLflow tracking, versioned data, and reproducible runs
Dockerized model deployed behind a FastAPI endpoint with health checks
CI/CD pipeline that auto-retrains a model on new data and redeploys on metric threshold
Model monitoring dashboard with drift detection alerts (Evidently AI or custom)
Model registry workflow: train → register → stage → promote to production
